meta.title: MyQuickPaste - One Click. Paste the Full Text.
meta.description: Tired of copy-pasting the same text every day? Save your snippets and paste with one click. A lightweight always-on-top tool for Windows. Free on Microsoft Store.

hero.catch: Save frequently used text. Paste with one click.
hero.headline: MyQuickPaste — lives in the corner of your screen. Paste saved text with one click on Windows.

features.label: One-click paste
features.text: Drop AI prompts, code snippets, and email templates right where you're working.

features.label: Easy to set up
features.text: Copy text once, save it as a slot. That's it.

features.label: Stays on your PC
features.text: Encrypted local storage. Nothing uploaded to the cloud.

features.label: Simple and clear
features.text: Compact, always on top, and easy to pick up from day one.

hero.ctaSecondary: Try all Pro features free for 14 days
hero.trust: Microsoft Store certified · Data encrypted locally on your PC
hero.screenshotAlt: MyQuickPaste: click a slot to paste the full saved text. Set it up once in Edit.

problem.title: Sound familiar?
items: Digging for the same ChatGPT prompt every time you need it
Typing the same greetings and replies in email and chat
Searching Notepad for Excel formulas or IDs you use every day
problem.solution: Save it once in MyQuickPaste. Paste anytime from a compact window that stays on top.

benefits.title: Three reasons people stick with it

items.title: One-click paste
items.text: Paste saved text without breaking your flow.

items.title: Always within reach
items.text: Compact and always on top—no alt-tabbing just to copy and paste.

items.title: Private by design
items.text: Your snippets stay on your PC, encrypted. Nothing sent to the cloud.

items.title: Text slots
items.text: Organize with tabs A–E. Free includes 10 slots; Pro adds more.

items.title: Clipboard history
items.text: Auto-save your last 20 copies (Pro). Paste something you copied earlier in a click.

items.title: Quick transforms
items.text: Insert date or time, or change case before you paste.

items.title: 21 languages
items.text: Use the app in 21 languages, including English and Japanese.

items.title: Office work
items.text: Email templates, signatures, and canned replies—one click away.

items.title: Creators & developers
items.text: AI prompts, code snippets, and templates pasted instantly.

items.title: Support & admin
items.text: Drop FAQ answers and standard greetings into chat in one click.

items.title: Anyone who types all day
items.text: Cut out repetitive typing starting today.

pricing.title: Pricing
pricing.note: The base app is free. Pro is available as a Microsoft Store add-on.

cta.title: Stop wasting time on repetitive typing
cta.lead: Install in minutes. Start free and try every Pro feature for 14 days.
